chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 127 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 28-06-2021 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Abdul Rehman Khakrani Abro, Advocate, files power and objections along with certain documents on behalf of respondents No.5 to 8, which are taken on record. Statements have also been filed by learned AAG Sindh on behalf of respondents No.3 and 4, which too are taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner will be satisfied and will not press the instant C.P, if a statement is taken on record that respondents No.5 to 8 will not go or bother him at his house in any manner whatsoever. Learned counsel representing respondents No.5 to 8, who are also present in the Court, undertakes that his clients i.e. respondents No.5 to 8 will not disturb the petitioner in whatsoever manner. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of. J U D G E Abdul Basit
